defect: leak source identification by color/location (trans red, coolant green/orange, oil...)
prompt: Diagnose the most likely fault or failure mode and explain what evidence supports it.
scenario: You are on a field-service visit to an installed, operating asset, working from symptoms, the work order, and OEM service information. The work under review is Fluids & leaks, part of the Automotive & Powertrain scope. The observed field condition is: leak source identification by color/location (trans red, coolant green/orange, oil...). The work is in service as an operating asset. Reference material on hand: OEM specs.
title: Fault diagnosis: Fluids & leaks (service call)
